lessons.title: While and Until 🔁
lessons.description: Learn to repeat code while a condition is true, or until it becomes true.

lessons.title: The Times Loop ⏱️
lessons.description: The simplest way to run code a specific number of times.

lessons.title: The For Loop 🔄
lessons.description: Iterate over a sequence or range of numbers.

lessons.title: The Each Iterator 🧱
lessons.description: Meet Ruby's favorite and most powerful way to loop through data.

lessons.title: Next and Break 🛑
lessons.description: Learn how to skip ahead or completely escape a loop.
